creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have made a change to dev.freshports.org to help this situation.

Now, it reads:

To add the package, run one of these commands:

* pkg install benchmarks/phoronix-test-suite
* pkg install phoronix-test-suite-php74

NOTE: This is a PHP port. Instead of phoronix-test-suite-php74 listed in the above command, you can pick from the names under the Packages section.


Would have have assisted in this situation?
